title: Clean up stale PayloadMcpApiKey references in payload.config.ts
body: The payload.config.ts at lines 77-86 contains a comment referencing 'PayloadMcpApiKey' and code that checks for it, but this collection no longer exists. The isAdminUser function could be simplified since it only checks 'users' collection now.
rationale: Dead code/reference to a deleted collection - reduces confusion and potential confusion for future developers
